message:
feat(freeze): support multi-arg tail call optimization

Improved tail call optimization to handle functions with multiple arguments.

Before: Only single-argument tail recursion optimized
After: N-argument tail recursion converts to goto loop

Implementation:
- Extract argc from tail_call operand
- Pop all N arguments from stack
- Reassign to argv[0..N]
- Reset stack pointer and jump to function start

Example (will work if QuickJS emits tail_call opcode):
  function sumTailRec(n, acc) {
    if (n <= 0) return acc;
    return sumTailRec(n - 1, acc + n);  // ← Optimized to goto
  }

Limitations:
- Requires QuickJS to emit tail_call opcode (strict mode)
- Only works for self-recursive functions
- Currently QuickJS doesn't always detect tail calls

Next: Force strict mode or patch QuickJS to emit tail_call more aggressively
